Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to start after the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in a case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by at least two occurrences of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include a major revision cycle (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Time elapsed from the first SW-Reviewer Agreed to the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases with multiple reviewer agreements
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, specifically in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs immediately before SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be completed after the final SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex reviewer assignment scenarios
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between the last SW-Reviewer Agreed and the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that end with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases that previously experienced reviewer unavailability or decline events (e.g., SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision grouped by the number of distinct reviewers who agreed in the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between the final Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in revision cycles following SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after the completion of all required reviewer agreements in a single assignment round
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2) prior to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs
